publisher: Bundesamt für Wirtschaft und Ausfuhrkontrolle (BAFA), Germany
fetch_mode_note: BAFA API requires active-funding date filters (foerderungAb/foerderungBis). Unfiltered fetches return HTTP 400. Each snapshot represents products listed as actively funded at the time of extraction. Absence from a later snapshot = BAFA List: No for that period. No delisting cause is inferred.
filter_note: foerderungAb and foerderungBis are filter-only parameters — they do NOT appear in API response items.

product_status_policy.bafa_list_yes: Product is present in the latest active BAFA snapshot.
product_status_policy.bafa_list_no: Product is absent from the latest active BAFA snapshot. No cause is inferred or stored.
product_status_policy.reference_baseline_note: March 2026 snapshot is the project's initial BAFA reference list and master-data seed. Products absent from later snapshots remain master/reference candidates with BAFA List: No.

scope_investigation.unfiltered_mode_result: HTTP 400 — Eine Suche mit diesen Filterkriterien ist nicht möglich
scope_investigation.conclusion: Active-snapshot mode is the only viable fetch mode. Full historical coverage is not available via API.

snapshot_retention_policy: raw/YYYY-MM/ and parsed/YYYY-MM/ are gitignored (large files, rebuilt by scripts). manifest.json and fetch-log.md are committed. diffs/YYYY-MM/ are gitignored. listing_history.json is gitignored (derived, rebuilt by diff-snapshots.mjs).

known_snapshots.business_meaning: Initial BAFA reference list used as the project's German heat pump master-data seed. Products absent from later BAFA active snapshots remain reference/master products with BAFA List: No.
known_snapshots.format_note: Cleaned via bafa-scraper.cjs cleanItem() before Phase 2. English field names. Raw API format not available for this snapshot.

listing_history_note: Rebuilt by diff-snapshots.mjs after each new snapshot is parsed. Gitignored. Requires at least one parsed snapshot to initialize.
legal_notes: BAFA Wärmepumpenregister is a public administrative registry published by the German Federal Office for Economic Affairs and Export Control.
The API at elan1.bafa.bund.de is publicly accessible without authentication.
Products in the registry were approved for inclusion in the BEG (Bundesförderung für effiziente Gebäude) subsidy programme at time of listing.
Presence in the BAFA registry (or in a snapshot of it) does NOT confirm current BEG subsidy application eligibility. Verify current eligibility and application requirements directly at www.bafa.de.
Snapshot data reflects the state of the BAFA registry at the time of extraction only.
next_recommended_step: Master seed ready at master_seed/2026-07/. Review schema before app integration.
